title: Mohsen Rezaei CNN exclusive: talks 'deadlocked,' $24B frozen assets is 'test of trust' — warns US enters 'dark corridor' if fighting resumes; claims 'first victory' over US
snippet: Mohsen Rezaei, military adviser to Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei, told CNN in exclusive Tehran interview (Jun 5, published Jun 6): 'Negotiations at a deadlock and Trump must break this.' Iran demands $12B at signing, another $12B later — total $24B frozen assets as 'test of trust that America must pass.' Warned US would 'enter into a dark corridor' if fighting resumes. Claims Iran achieved 'first' victory over US.
tag_reason: New actor (Rezaei) with specific $24B demand and escalatory warning not previously reported
